creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
This patch updates java3d from 1.3.1 to 1.5.2.

The source tarball is a CVS source snapshot of all the source packages
required to build Java3D, with the tag "rel-1_5_2-fcs". It's currently
hosted on Google Webpages, but if this passes inspection, it may be an
idea to put the tarball on a FreeBSD distfiles mirror.

I've also requested maintainership of this port.

Fix: The following files have been removed:
	pkg-message-jre
	pkg-message-libmap
